nasb.text: Then the people of Nineveh believed in God; and they called a fast and put on sackcloth from the greatest to the least of them.

esv.text: And the people of Nineveh believed God. They called for a fast and put on sackcloth, from the greatest of them to the least of them.

cnv.text: 尼尼微人信了 　神，就宣告禁食，從大到小，都穿上麻衣。

ccb.text: 尼尼微城的人相信了上帝的话，便宣告禁食，所有的人，无论大小贵贱都换上麻衣。

csbs.text: 尼尼微人就相信神，并宣告禁食，无论是尊贵的还是卑微的，都披上麻布。
